worst_lines: line 1: header dropped the street-address and city/state/zip lines present in the original
line 11: TOTAL amount $14.56 missing from the right column
line 7: stray '...' leader dots garbling the CarltonCards price gap
line 9: SUBTOTAL row washed out / nearly invisible
line 8: added item '049063338Barbasol' code and name glued together

thermal.hybrid_issues: font is too crisp and high-contrast vs the original's soft thermal ink; no paper skew/warp; dropped the address header lines and the TOTAL/DEBIT payment amounts; leader-dot garble and a washed-out SUBTOTAL row
thermal.glyph_issues: no glyph-atlas panel was rendered in this 2-up (only ORIGINAL vs hybrid synthetic present), so glyph variant not evaluable
thermal.vs_original: both lack the real thermal print's slight rotation, uneven ink density, paper texture and edge curl; the synthetic is uniformly sharp where the original has fading/blooming, and it loses right-column amounts the original keeps aligned

summary: Legible hybrid render captures the overall Target layout but drops header address lines and the TOTAL/payment amounts, glues the added item code to its name, garbles the CarltonCards price with stray dots, and reads too crisp to pass as a real thermal print.
